scripts.push-force: echo 'push-force is DISABLED: this DB contains tables Drizzle does not manage (login_events, sync_run_status, pipeline tables), so push --force DROPs them and TRUNCATEs the populated contracts table. Apply additive schema via the API server runMigrations() and verify with: pnpm --filter @workspace/db run check-drift' >&2; exit 1
